message.content:
SDLC Review Result: PASS

✅ Error handling: All SQL operations wrapped in try/catch
✅ Input validation: Player name and score validated
✅ Security: No SQL injection risk — PreparedStatement used throughout
✅ Logging: java.util.logging used in all classes
✅ Documentation: All public methods have inline comments
✅ Memory: DB connection properly closed in finally/close()
✅ Performance: Efficient LinkedList for snake body

All checks passed. Code is production-ready.

GOAL_ACHIEVED
